transcript: Uh, Kayleigh? What is that? Pretty neat, huh? Not every day you get to be fired out of a super-sized Hot Wheels launcher. The principles are mostly the same. Been a tough build, but it's ready. The biggest, fastest theme park ever. Come on, we have a slingshot to catch. FRIENDS! I don't know. Subtitles by the Amara.org community Welcome to Hot Wheels Cars. This is Giant Canyon. Grab it, take it away. I have made it my pilot's license Pretty good, no? I have made it my pilot's license. Pretty good, no? Ha, ha, ha. What's going on? What giant Hot Wheels set would be complete without a loop? Snow, Lava and the Volcano! This is the ice cauldron! Woo-hoo-hoo-hoo! I feel the need! The need for G's! You see the room here? It's tracking your G-forces. Go as fast as you can while hitting extreme angles. Tango track engaged! Watch the birdie! Watch out for the duck! Stay in the middle! Head straight into that volcano! Norske Norske Woo, did you feel that? It's like an air track, even less drag and more speed. Right here! Welcome to Forest Falls! No time to take it in the views, foot's go, let's go, let's go, Rambos, Rambos! Norske Norske This is a hazard race, I would suggest a good off-road setup, you'd be surprised how difficult plastic terrain can be. We'll be right back. Storbritannia Norske Norske Norske Norske Norske Norske Norske Thanks for watching!
